description_long: This is a modern duplex house with two distinct units, each featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The left unit has a dark gray facade with a double garage, a blue pickup truck parked in the driveway, and a recessed entryway. The right unit is lighter in color, with a single-car garage, a car parked in the driveway, and a raised entry accessed by a set of steps. Both units are separated by a small landscaped area with palm trees and greenery, and the property faces a street with a sidewalk and parked blue sedan. The windows are arranged in clean, horizontal rows, and the overall structure emphasizes straight lines and open spaces. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and metal, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed duplex house with two garages, minimalist facades, and landscaped entryways separated by palm trees. The structure features clean lines, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing both house units, garages, driveways, palm trees, and cars parked on the street and driveways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rear and side of the house, the landscaped area, and the arrangement of windows and garages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of both units, flat roofs, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garages, driveways, and the side entry features of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed and raised entryways with steps, minimalist doors, and no porch or decorative columns.
